segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why is the new house special?

translations.zh-Hans: 这座新房子有什么特别之处？

segments.text: I had a letter from my sister yesterday.

translations.zh-Hans: 昨天我收到了姐姐的一封信。

segments.text: In her letter, she said that she would come to England next year.

translations.zh-Hans: 她在信中说，明年会到英国来。

segments.text: If she comes, she will get a surprise.

translations.zh-Hans: 她来了以后，会大吃一惊。

segments.text: We are now living in a beautiful new house in the country.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们现在住在乡间一栋漂亮的新房子里。

segments.text: Work on it had begun before my sister left.

translations.zh-Hans: 姐姐离开前，这座房子就已经动工了。

segments.text: The house was completed five months ago.
In my letter, I told her that she could stay with us.

translations.zh-Hans: 我在信中告诉她，她可以和我们住在一起。

segments.text: The house has many large rooms, and there is a lovely garden.

translations.zh-Hans: 这座房子有许多宽敞的房间，还有一个可爱的花园。

segments.text: It is a very modern house, so it looks strange to some people.

translations.zh-Hans: 这是一座非常现代化的房子，因此在有些人看来很奇怪。

segments.text: It must be the only modern house in the district.

translations.zh-Hans: 它一定是这个地区唯一的现代化住宅。
